sizing_rule.note: Position size adjusted so worst-case loss per trade cannot exceed current account equity. Prevents ruin on single trade but does not protect against prolonged drawdowns reducing equity below viable trading level.

source_rule_text: Position size must be limited such that the maximum loss on any single trade cannot exceed the equity line, preventing ruin on a single trade, though prolonged losing streaks could still force cessation of trading if equity drops sufficiently.
